title: Atmos Energy Corporation to Host Fiscal 2022 Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call on May 5, 2022
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) will host a conference call on Thursday, May 5, 2022, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern to review the company's Fiscal 2022 second quarter financial results. Atmos Energy will release these results on Wednesday, May 4, 2022, following the market close.
